---
title: "CzechVeg-DataViewer"
format: html
author: Klára Friesová
---

[https://vegscibrno.shinyapps.io/czechveg](https://vegscibrno.shinyapps.io/czechveg/)

This interactive data viewer provides maps and summary characteristics of vegetation plots for the entire Czech Vegetation Database and its subsets defined by plot size and location uncertainty, years of sampling, altitude, covers of vegetation layers, and occurrence of specific species or species groups.

![](images/clipboard-2787976972.jpeg)
